summary: End-to-end workflow for creating new agents with proper design, validation, dossier, and fixture generation.

inputs.name: agent_requirement
inputs.description: The requirement specification for the new agent.

inputs.name: domain_context
inputs.description: Domain context and existing agents in the target domain.

inputs.name: dossier_sources
inputs.description: Sources to build the agent dossier from.

outputs.name: agent_specification
outputs.description: Complete agent specification with frontmatter and content.

outputs.name: agent_dossier
outputs.description: Dossier with source provenance and quality score.

outputs.name: agent_fixtures
outputs.description: Routing test fixtures for the new agent.

budget.notes: Stay focused on agent creation lifecycle only.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is new agent creation, not modification or deletion.
Require agent requirement and domain context before design begins.
Agent specification must pass format and content validation.
Dossier score must be >= 80 before promotion to staging.
Return agent spec, dossier, and fixtures with all gates passed.

steps.action: Design the agent specification with triggers, inputs, outputs, and verification.
Review the agent design for architectural fit and boot token impact.
Evaluate or create the agent dossier with source provenance and quality score.
Generate routing test fixtures for the new agent (5 fixtures minimum).
Run final validation on the complete agent package.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read existing agents, registry data, and source materials.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Write agent specification, dossier, and fixture files.

tools.name: shell.readonly
tools.purpose: Run validation scripts during agent creation.

verification.method: Check agent specification has all required frontmatter fields and content sections.
Check routing fixtures exist for the new agent (minimum 5).

success_criteria: Agent specification passes format and content validation.
Dossier score is >= 80 with complete provenance.
Routing fixtures cover positive, edge, and negative cases.

rollback.when: If any gate fails, revert to the step before the failure and report the issue.
